title: Drawer360 1.75m Shower Hose | 69-Inch Anti-Kink Stainless Steel Shower Pipe | Universal Fit G1/2 Standard Replacement Hose with Washers – Chrome Effect
features: PREMIUM 69” STAINLESS STEEL SHOWER HOSE: Constructed from top-quality stainless steel with a chrome finish and EPDM inner lining, this hose is designed to withstand high pressure and temperature, ideal for power showers and pump systems.
CONSISTENT, RELIABLE WATER FLOW: Ensures steady, uninterrupted water delivery for optimal shower performance, enhancing everyday showering and adding value to bathroom renovations.
ANTI-LEAK AND ANTI-KINK DESIGN: Features a double-woven structure that prevents leaks and kinks, with rubber washers on connectors for a snug, leak-free fit.
FLEXIBLE AND DURABLE: Our 69” long shower hose provides excellent reach and manoeuvrability, allowing the shower head to swing freely without buckling or twisting.
EFFORTLESS INSTALLATION: Universally compatible with 1/2 inch BSP connectors and includes a step-by-step installation manual for an easy setup, making it a great choice for DIY projects.
ENHANCED DURABILITY: Built to endure high water pressure and frequent use, this hose is rust-resistant and tarnish-proof, providing reliable performance over the long term.
EASY MAINTENANCE: The stainless steel surface resists dirt and grime, making it easy to wipe clean and maintain a like-new appearance.
PERFECT FOR HOMEOWNERS AND DIY ENTHUSIASTS: A top choice for modern homeowners and hands-on individuals seeking quality, functionality, and style in bathroom upgrades.
VERSATILE COMPATIBILITY: Compatible with a wide range of shower heads and bath taps, seamlessly integrating into any bathroom setup.
STYLISH, HIGH-QUALITY UPGRADE: An essential addition to any bathroom, combining durability, style, and ease of use for a superior shower experience.
description: Product Description Drawer360 - More than a Shower Hose Drawer360 started with a dream. A larger than life dream to bring ease in day to day life. Having a reliable and dependable solution for showers in Britain is one such concern that grabbed our attention. We’ve identified a gap in the market. We found an opportunity to make life a bit easier with a sturdy & premium quality Shower Hose. Drawer360 shower hoses are made with premium quality materials. Focus on quality is core. Stainless steel outer tube makes it sturdy and dependable, while chrome polish makes it consistent with your color theme. On top of being sturdy, our shower hose is bend, explosion, and rustproof. Flexibility 69 inches or 1.75 meters long shower hose is convenient for both adults and kids Explosion Proof Life needs balance. Like our Shower Hose do not leak nor it explode the water pressure Easy to Install Install all by yourself. Attach one thread to tap and another one to shower head, tighten connectors! Leakage, this is what you have had to complain about your previous shower hose, right? No more leakage issue with the Drawer360 Shower Hose. The gratification of buyers is our top priority. We had to address your grievances. That is why we used the latest technology to produce this dependable Shower Hose. Not just the outer body of the shower hose, but we construct a quality silicone gasket as well. The inner tube is made with high-quality EPDM. Premium solid brass nut connectors will make sure no leakage. SPECIFICATIONS Length 1.75m or 69 Inches Washer Rubber Washers Shower Hose Stainless Steel, EPDM Connectors Brass 22.90mm Diameter External Tube 13.20 mm Diameter Weight 240g Package Shower Hose with 04 Rubber Washers and User Manual
